buildCommand:
test -n "$SUPABASE_URL" || { echo 'ERROR: SUPABASE_URL is not set'; exit 1; }; test -n "$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" || { echo 'ERROR: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is not set'; exit 1; }; test -n "$GROQ_API_KEY" || { echo 'ERROR: GROQ_API_KEY is not set'; exit 1; }; printf "SUPABASE_URL=%s
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=%s
GROQ_API_KEY=%s
" "$SUPABASE_URL" "$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" "$GROQ_API_KEY" > .env && flutter build web
